entry.title: Re: How to check average number of users connecting to the Fiori applications/services
entry.content: @Ajaruddin - the Mindset Merlin tool contains a Fiori App Analyzer that will answer that - also includes an optional user rating system to understand which Fiori apps are rated highly: https://www.mindsetconsulting.com/merlin-by-mindset/

entry.title: Calling bound / unbound CAP actions from Fiori elements application.
entry.content:
In this blog post, We will go through the process of calling CAP actions out of a JavaScript function using the "invokeAction" function of the SAP Fiori elements Edit flow API.

In CAP, actions can be bound to a specific entity or unbound and just be a part of the service. Bound actions can only be executed, when at least one entity is selected. Unbound actions can be executed anytime.

It is possible to invoke CAP actions out of a JavaScript function using the "invokeAction" function of the SAP Fiori elements Edit flow API.

Note: The purpose of this blog is mainly to demonstrate how to create a CAP action and call it from within the Fiori elements application.

 

I have taken the reference from

A controller extension offering hooks into the edit flow of the application 

CAP actions out of a JavaScript function using the "invokeAction" function of the SAP Fiori elements Edit flow API. 

In this article will discuss

1) An example of a simple CAP action would be the addition of two numbers.

2) How to use the custom action button to invoke the CAP action from the Fiori elements application.

Lets get started.

1) An example of a simple CAP action would be the addition of two numbers.

  • Create the simple CAP action in the service definition of the cap application as shown below.

 

  • The extension logic that will be written when the cap action is called is now displayed below.

 

  • I have created a custom action using the SAP FPM Fiori elements application, as indicated below.

 

  1. invoke CAP actions out of a JavaScript function using the "invokeAction" function of the SAP Fiori elements Edit flow API as shown below.

     

    sActionName: The name of the action to be called.

    mInParameters:   
    1. contexts: For a bound action, a context or an array with contexts for which the action is to be called must be provided.
    2. label: A human-readable label for the action. This is needed in case the action has a parameter and a parameter dialog is shown to the user. The label will be used for the title of the dialog and for the confirmation button.
    3.  model: For an unbound action, an instance of an OData V4 model must be provided.
    4.  parameterValues: A map of action parameter names and provided values.
    5.  skipParameterDialog: Skips the action parameter dialog if values are provided for all of them in parameterValues.
  • Now that the action can be triggered via the UI, let's observe the outcome.

Conclusion

After going through this post, you should be able to call the bound and unbound CAP actions from Fiori elements using  Edit Flow. I hope this guide has been helpful and if you have any questions or comments, please feel free to leave them below.

 

  • Please follow https://community.sap.com/topics/ui5 for SAPUI5 Topic related updates.
  • Post questions and answers on SAPUI5 here.
  • Read other posts on SAPUI5 here.

      Please follow me for the future updates.

entry.title: Possibility to introduce retry mechanism for REST API failures in ECC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Hope you are doing great!!

I have a request to apply retry mechanism in SAP ECC to automatically re-process failed API messages (REST HTTP calls). Today using Custom FMs we build and call the HTTPS link to Middleware API endpoint (not CPI) which in turn passes the data to Target. We primarily use Output types to extract data and pass it in JSON format through the HTTPS call. So, failure messages are not logged at a single place in SAP today and is stored in Output processing logs in transactional level. 

I'm thinking of storing the failures with document numbers in a custom table and use a separate program to re-trigger all through Batch runs.

I'm looking for some advice on any better/alternative solutions I can implement considering the fact that the number of failures can be in thousands sometimes when Middleware is down for longer period of time.

Regards,

NRK

entry.title: Missing the 'Develop' tab in SAP Cloud Integration on the trial account.
entry.content:
In my trial account, I can't access the 'Develop' tab or create products. How am I supposed to study properly for the certification if the account I'm relying on doesn’t have all the features? Please help.

This is all I managed to configure:

This is the image that should supposedly appear:

I didn't understand if the exam will be based on an earlier version of the tool or if this is just for the trial account.

I really appreciate the help.

Regards,

Gabriela.

entry.title: Blofin Referral Code 'Cq3WDI' Best Choose in 2024

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Ibrahim , and I am an aspiring SAP FI-CO Consultant based in Egypt. I have recently begun my journey in the SAP ecosystem and am eager to further develop my skills and knowledge in this field. I believe that participating in the Digital Skills Initiative will significantly aid in my professional growth.

I identify as a person in the following categories:

A resident of a remote or underserved location, where access to economic opportunities is limited compared to urban areas.
A first-generation college graduate, striving to build a successful career in technology.
A minority in my geographic location, with aspirations to make a significant impact in the SAP community.
The world of technology, particularly SAP, fascinates me with its potential to transform businesses and enhance their processes. I am committed to learning more about SAP FI-CO and to embracing the challenges of the certification process.

I have started my learning journey and am motivated to achieve certification, which I believe will open new doors in my career. I am grateful for the opportunity to apply for this initiative and am excited about the potential to contribute more effectively in the SAP space.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Ibrahim Youssef

entry.title: Re: Long Term Incentive - Salary Review
entry.content:
Hi @pwc_94 

If the customer wants to reflect the different assignments (and salary or target bonus % changes) an employee had during the year in the calculation of the bonus payout then there is no other choice in SuccessFactors but to use Variable Pay.

Salary Review or Stock tabs can be repurposed of course but they can only retrieve data from EC as of one effective date. So your customer would have to accept to pay everybody's bonus using the 12/31 Salary and Target Bonus % (which means they would be more generous than they legally should because all people who got promoted towards the end of the year would receive a much higher payout than they should).

Usually we try to use Variable Pay for everything bonus related.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the HTML5 Application on BTP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Greetings for the day! 

I have an odd situation. 

I developed a CAP service with Hana Cloud and added the app UI content (Fiori Elements).

All the required bindings have been mapped to mta.yml file and successfully deployed on the cloud foundry and all the service bindings were created successfully including HTML5 binding.

CAP  service , App Router etc. deployed & shows in green status as expected.

However, the Fiori App doesn't appear under the HTML5  Application Repository on BTP. 

Can you please help me to understand what could be the possible reason for that. 

Looking forward for the help . Thank You!

Best Regards

MD Manauwar

entry.title: how to reduce the excess posted depreciation to an asset? i mean to say reverse the depreciation.
In a asset class, is it possible to assign different depreciation key to different assets.
entry.content: i have created one asset class A and assigned x depreciation key. in that asset class i have created 100 assets. i have created another asset class B with y as depreciation key. now i want to change the depreciation key to 20 assets of asset class A from X to Y. How to do this. purpose is some of the assets of asset class A depreciation has been changed. now without creating new assets to the 20 assets, is it possible to change depreciation key in asset mast of asset class A.

entry.title: Re: How to check average number of users connecting to the Fiori applications/services

Hi Ajaruddin,


Please check SAP note: 3203036 - Tracking usage of Fiori apps. 

This note explains the ways to track the usage of Fiori apps.

Regards.

Fernando.

entry.title: Problem in POST Exit Implementation of C4C - S4HC Integration package - Create Service Order in SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing a problem with the POST Exit Implementation of iFlow "Create Service Order in SAP Business Suite". The problem in in the Filter, here the Filter on "ServiceOrderRequest" does not include the namespace:

Therefore, in the exit implementation I need to create the XML without the namespace (by using XSLT), BUT the SOAP call is not successfull without the namespace.

Other iFlows in this package have the namespace included in the filter:

For me it looks like an error in the iFlow, any other opinions/help?

@AbinashA

entry.title: Recreate or Copy Screens using XML SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hi there, previously before PILOT version of SAC - SAP Application Cloud Studio we can easily copy screens from tenant to another by just selecting the screen OWL/QA and pressing enter we get XML code from which we can easily replace some settings like namespace etc to copy screens.

Since arrival of PILOT version when we tried to do the same it just opens the designer UI of that screen. 
How can we view the XML code now? PILOT version is received on August 2024.

#SAP #BusinessByDesign #SAPBYD #SAPBusinessByDesign

entry.title: Re: Inconsistent Replication Flow Behavior in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: The replication flow is initial only though @Martin_Kuma

entry.title: Re: NPL not installed succesfully while installing ABAP 7...
entry.content: Maybe it's worth trying the same OpenSuse Version 15.4 as used in the YouTube Video https://ftp.uni-bayreuth.de/linux/opensuse/distribution/leap/15.4/iso/

entry.title: Re: Business role provisioning from Microsoft Entra
entry.content:
Maybe it would be enough to allow shadow user creation and assign the Role Collection by mapping the Group provided via the Assertion. 

But if shadow user creation should not be active you could define a Identity Authentication source system that only transfers user match the filter defined in the  ias.group.filter property. This source system should be the one used in the target system SAP BTP XS Advanced UAA (Cloud Foundry).

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the HTML5 Application on BTP
entry.content: You write that you hava a custom approuter. So maybe you have published the apps inside there and not deployed them to the HTML5 repo?

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the...
entry.content: Have you used the approach described in the CAP Documentation: 5. User Interfaces

entry.title: Calculation View created in the Business Application Studio trial version would not open
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Has anyone here experienced this with the Business Application Studio trial version? I've created a .hdbcalculationview file but I cannot open it to edit. Each time I try opening, it gets stuck in the Loading screen. Browser console shows below error but unable to figure out what's going on. Already tried clearing the browser cache couple of times but that did not help. Appreciate any suggestions! 

Core-preload.js:42 Uncaught (in promise) Error: failure during creation of required plugins ->

Error: Problems detected while checking service definition consistency:
Not all required services are provided:
Plugin: sap.watt.hana.editor.hdbdd missing required services ---> rndrtService

 

Regards,

Sreejith

entry.title: Re: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to...
entry.content:
Dear @superpalmi ,

Can you please check if the appropriate permissions are configured to allow access to Solr. Additionally, please verify that the security.json file in Solr is correctly set up to permit access to the admin page.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to schedule application jobs from a RAP-based business object
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer 

Thanks for the information on scheduling a Job via RAP application.

I have a quick question. I am working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud System 3 tier landscape. I want to know if there is a way to directly schedule an object as a Scheduled Job like we did in SM36 in 0n-Premise system. 

For Example, I have created a class via Developer Extensibility and now I want to run that class daily and send lets say an email based on some condition or Update some sales orders based on some condition. Is it possible via S4 Application jobs or we have to go via Intergation Suite???

Regards,

Aman Mittal

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition

Archana J

entry.title: Complex Customer Hierarchy
entry.content:
Our company is transitioning from three separate CRMs systems to SAP. Currently, we have duplicate customer records across these CRMs because each system is used for different product ranges.

The initial plan is to maintain these duplicate/triplicate customer accounts in SAP, as each account, though representing the same entity, often has different payers, delivery addresses, and assigned sales representatives. However, we're exploring if a more structured approach is possible.

Example of our customer structure: 

We sell products to various schools under the New York City Department of Education through different contracts. In our CRMs, each school isn't treated as a single entity; instead, different departments within the same school are handled as separate entities. 

For example:

  1. The science department of a high school purchases lab equipment and is billed separately.
  2. The athletic department of the same high school also buys from us but is treated as a distinct entity.

Ideally, we'd like to structure our customer hierarchy in SAP as follows:

  1. Parent Account: New York City Department of Education
  2. Child Accounts: Individual Schools
  3. Sub-Child Accounts: Departments within each school (e.g., Science Department, Athletic Department)

Questions are:

  1. Is it possible to create this hierarchical structure in SAP? Who in the example would be created as a business partner? In my eyes the department of education and each school would be Business partners, then each department would be created as a child of each school?
  2. If that's true, can each child and sub-child account have its own:
    • Sales representative
    • Payer
    • Delivery address
    • Other unique attributes

entry.title: Build a Java Spring boot middleware application to consume SAP OData service with SAP Cloud SDK
entry.content:
Introduction

We had a requirement to consume a SAP OData service in an existing spring boot application running on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry. There are many ways to consume an OData service in a Java application, but we found an easier way to consume the OData service by using SAP Cloud SDK. There are many business use cases where we need to develop an application to run on SAP BTP or any cloud and consume OData service.  In this blog, I will share the steps to consume an OData service in a maven-based Java Spring boot application with the help of SAP Cloud SDK.

Understanding SAP Cloud SDK

SAP provides a software development kit (SDK) called the SAP Cloud SDK to make developers' jobs easier. The SDK contains a set of libraries that simplify interacting with APIs at a higher level by hiding technical communication details.

The SAP Cloud SDK was developed to reduce the effort of building extension applications for SAP S/4HANA Cloud. It provides Java and JavaScript libraries, as well as a set of tools for developers, such as fault tolerance, cache management, tutorials, and project templates.

The SAP Cloud SDK enables partners, customers to easily consume OData services from SAP S/4HANA Cloud, discover existing OData services, and use built-in developer tools such as cache management, API metering, latency, and fault tolerance.

SAP Cloud SDK also allows you to generate the Virtual Data Model (VDM) of custom OData Services as well as standard SAP OData Services.  This VDM can then be readily consumed by your application

SAP CAP Model uses SAP Cloud SDK behind the scenes to perform a variety of tasks.

Business use cases

  • Scenario 1:- If you are planning to build your application using MongoDB, then you will not be able to use the CAP Model (since it only supports HANA for production), so you can create an application(MTA) in Java Spring boot and make use of SAP Cloud SDK for connecting to remote systems, consuming APIs in a type-safe manner, securing your application and providing multi-tenant support, etc.
  • Scenario 2: - If you already have an existing Java application that was built without using the SAP CAP Model and you want to add more features like consuming an OData service.
  • Scenario 3: - If you need advanced features in your app (currently, not provided by CAP Model) - for example, Resilience. 
  • Scenario 4: - You Are Extending an SAP Product or Service, building a Middle-Ware, Publishing a Cloud App

Steps at a high level

  • Create a maven-based Java Spring boot application/project.
  • Download the metadata of the service and save it as “serviceName.edmx”.
  • Put the EDMX file in the resource folder of the application/project.
  • (optional) Create a service naming properties file in the resource folder.
  • Add the dependencies (SAP Cloud SDK OData generator and others) in the pom.xml file.
  • Add the OData generator maven plugin in the pom.xml file.
  • Compile the application to generate the type-safe Java client library from the EDMX of the service, which gives you programmatic access to all the entities, fields, and structures of the OData service
  • Create the controller class and use the generated classes to interact with the OData service.
  • Create the destination in the environment variable for local testing and in the BTP for productive use.
  • Run the application and test it locally.
  • Deploy the application to BTP Cloud Foundry as an MTA application.

Prerequisite

  1. Eclipse(with Spring tool suite and Lombok plugin)
  2. JDK(1.8).
  3. Access to any OData service (I will be using Business Partner API from SAP Business Accelerator Hub)  

(In this blog I will not cover the BTP deployment, I will explain how to test the application locally.  Please refer to my other blog for deployment to BTP Cloud Foundry)

Steps

  1. Create a new spring boot project in Eclipse as mentioned below.

  1. The project structure in eclipse will look like below.

  1. Open the pom.xml file and replace the below code.

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
	<parent>
		<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
		<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
		<version>2.2.0.RELEASE</version>
		<relativePath /> <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
	</parent>
	<groupId>com.sl</groupId>
	<artifactId>SpringBootToConsumeODataThroughCloudSDK</artifactId>
	<version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<name>SpringBootToConsumeODataThroughCloudSDK</name>
	<description>Sample Spring Boot App to consume OData through Cloud SDK</description>
	<url />
	<licenses>
		<license />
	</licenses>
	<developers>
		<developer />
	</developers>
	<scm>
		<connection />
		<developerConnection />
		<tag />
		<url />
	</scm>
	<properties>
		<java.version>1.8</java.version>
	</properties>
	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web-services</artifactId>
		</dependency>



		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.sap.cloud.sdk.datamodel</groupId>
			<artifactId>odata-core</artifactId>
			<version>4.15.0</version>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
			<artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>javax.inject</groupId>
			<artifactId>javax.inject</artifactId>
			<version>1</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>

	</dependencies>

	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
				<artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.sap.cloud.sdk.datamodel</groupId>
				<artifactId>odata-generator-maven-plugin</artifactId>
				<!-- Please use the latest version here -->
				<version>4.15.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>generate-consumption</id>
						<phase>generate-sources</phase>
						<goals>
							<goal>generate</goal>
						</goals>
						<configuration>
							<inputDirectory>${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/edmx</inputDirectory>
							<outputDirectory>${project.build.sourceDirectory}</outputDirectory>
							<serviceNameMappingFile>${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/serviceNameMappings.properties</serviceNameMappingFile>
							<deleteOutputDirectory>false</deleteOutputDirectory>
							<packageName>com.sl.vdm</packageName>
							<defaultBasePath>odata/v2/</defaultBasePath>
							<compileScope>COMPILE</compileScope>
							<serviceMethodsPerEntitySet>true</serviceMethodsPerEntitySet>
							<overwriteFiles>true</overwriteFiles>
						</configuration>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
		</plugins>
	</build>

</project>

 

(In this blog we will be using OData V2 and SAP Cloud SDK version 4, if you want to consume OData V4 then the dependency version needs to be changed in the pom.xml file)

  1. Go to SAP Business Accelerator Hub to download the metadata of the OData service.
  2. Search for “business” in the search box for business partner OData service (In this blog we will be using OData V2).

 

(Please login with your personal(trial) SAP user account)

  1. Click on “Business Partner (A2X)” to navigate to business partner API.
  2. Click on “API Specification” and download the EDMX (service metadata).

 

(If you want to consume an OData service that is not available in the Business Accelerator Hub like On-promise ECC/S4HANA OData service then you can fetch the metadata of the service by using $metadata and save the content in a .edmx file{any name})

  1. Create a folder called “edmx” in the resource folder of the project and copy the downloaded/created edmx file.
  2. Also create a properties file “serviceNameMappings.properties” in the resource folder.

 

# API BUSINESS PARTNER
API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.className = APIBusinessPartner
API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.packageName = businesspartner

 

  1.  Now the folder structure in Eclipse should look like below.

  1. Now compile the project by using the “maven install” command.

  1. Once the project is compiled successfully it will generate the classes for the OData service which will be used in our business logic for integration with the OData service.
  2. Now the folder structure should look like below in Eclipse.

(Sometimes it doesn’t create the correct URL in the generated service interface (APIBusinessPartnerService,java), so please verify and replace it with the correct URL as mentioned below. You can find the correct URL when you click “Code Snippet” in the “Try Out” tab in Business Accelerator Hub)

 

String DEFAULT_SERVICE_PATH = "odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER";

 

  1. Now create a controller class (BusinessPartnerController.java) to fetch business partners.
  2. Replace the below code in the BusinessPartnerController class.

 

package com.sl.api;

import java.util.List;

import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;

import com.google.gson.Gson;
import com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.Destination;
import com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.DestinationAccessor;
import com.sap.cloud.sdk.cloudplatform.connectivity.HttpDestination;
import com.sl.vdm.namespaces.businesspartner.BusinessPartner;
import com.sl.vdm.services.DefaultAPIBusinessPartnerService;

@RestController
public class BusinessPartnerController {

	private final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(this.getClass());
	private static final String APIKEY_HEADER = "apikey";
	private static final String SANDBOX_APIKEY = "---Generated API Key---";

	@GetMapping("/GetBusinessPartners")
	public ResponseEntity<?> getBusinessPartners() {
		String DESTINATION_NAME = "MyDestination"; // in productive code, use constants file to
													// retrieve destination name
		 HttpDestination destination =
                 DestinationAccessor.getDestination(DESTINATION_NAME).asHttp();
		

		final List<BusinessPartner> businessPartners = new DefaultAPIBusinessPartnerService()
				.getAllBusinessPartner().select(BusinessPartner.BUSINESS_PARTNER, BusinessPartner.LAST_NAME,
						BusinessPartner.FIRST_NAME, BusinessPartner.CREATED_ON)
				.filter(BusinessPartner.MALE.eq(true))
				.top(200)
                .withHeader(APIKEY_HEADER, SANDBOX_APIKEY)
				.executeRequest(destination);

		return ResponseEntity.ok( new Gson().toJson(businessPartners));
	}
}

 

  1. Generate the API key from Business Accelerator Hub and copy it in the variable SANDBOX_APIKEY in BusinessPartnerController class.

(If the OData service is from other system like ECC or S4HANA then this step is not required, and the authentication will be set in the destination which will be automatically picked up by the SAP Cloud SDK library)

  1.  Now we need to create a destination in the environment variable to configure the OData service URL and authentication details (in this case authentication is not required).
  2. Right-click on the project and select the run configuration, select the “Environment” tab in the dialogue box.
  3. Click on “Add” to create an environment variable for the destination. Keep the name as “destinations” and value as mentioned below.

 

[{"name": "MyDestination", "url": "https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/"}]

 

<<sample destination with basic authentication>>

[{"name": "MyDestination", "url": "--OData service base URL--", "name": "user name", "password": "password for the given user" }]

(You can add multiple destinations to connect to different systems)

  1. Click on apply and run.
  2. If everything is fine, then it will be a success and show the port number for the App.
  3. Now you can test it from your browser by using the application URL

Note :- This blog is written based on my personal leraning, please feel free to commnet for improvement.

Happy learning!!

Best Regards,

Sudhir.

entry.title: create and update sales order with API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch with content-id in a changeset
entry.content:
I am trying to update the sales order schedule lines once the sales order is created using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch. 
i am getting 500 Internal server error. in SAP S4 HANA 2023. any one faced similar issue please help.

how to get the sales order number created in the first post call to do patch in the same changeset using Content-ID?. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: What Are You Looking Forward to Learning or Doing at Devtoberfest This Year?
entry.content: I am looking forward to learn new enhancements in SAP Technical world, while doing tutorials on SAP CAP, MAD & Process Automation.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I am Uchechukwu Ukaigwe, from a developing country, and I am looking to switch careers in mid-life after working with IT solutions in enterprise organizations. I recognize the critical role SAP plays in simplifying business processes and transforming work in the tech ecosystem. However, due to limited opportunities and financial constraints, I am unable to afford the necessary certifications.

As an underrepresented professional, breaking into the SAP ecosystem feels like the right step. With SAP’s flexible learning, mentorship, and upskilling programs, I believe I can overcome these barriers. Becoming an SAP professional would truly change my life and help me build a successful career in tech.

Sincerely,
Uchechukwu Ukaigwe

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

 

I am Uchechukwu Ukaigwe, from a developing country, and I am looking to switch careers in mid-life after working with IT solutions in enterprise organizations. I recognize the critical role SAP plays in simplifying business processes and transforming work in the tech ecosystem. However, due to limited opportunities and financial constraints, I am unable to afford the necessary training.

As an underrepresented professional, breaking into the SAP ecosystem feels like the right step. With SAP’s flexible learning, mentorship, and upskilling programs, I believe I can overcome these barriers. Becoming an SAP professional would truly change my life and help me build a successful career in tech.

Sincerely,
Uchechukwu Ukaigwe

entry.content:
Hi David,

I am Shahad Iqbal from Bangladesh, Currently working in SAP ABAP and really excited about this Digital Skills initiative.

I identify myself as a person who is underrepresented in the tech industry due geographic location. I already completed few learning journeys such as 

- Learning the Basics of ABAP Programming on SAP BTP. 

-Exploring SAP S/4HANA Sales

-Setting up an ABAP Environment on SAP BTP

I am really excited to learn and take free certification exams to take my career in the next level.

entry.title: Re: create and update sales order with API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch with content-id in a changes
entry.content:

3235882 - API_SALES_ORDER_SRV doesn't update Schedule Lines correctly - SAP for Me

3311614 - API_SALES_ORDER_SRV doesn't update Schedule Lines correctly - SAP for Me

etc.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am excited to express my interest in participating in the digital skills initiative and obtaining a free SAP code certificate. My name is Mohamed Ali, and I am a resident of Saudi Arabia.

With a Bachelor's degree in IT and a Master's degree in Software Engineering, I have a solid academic background in the field. Professionally, I have been working as an end-user in the MM module for the past year. However, I am now looking to support my career path and believe that acquiring an SAP certification will be a valuable asset in helping me achieve my career goals.

I am eager to develop my skills and knowledge in SAP and am confident that this initiative will provide me with the necessary tools and resources to achieve my objectives. I am particularly interested in [MM Module].

Thank you for considering my interest, and I look forward to the opportunity to participate in this initiative.

Best regards,
Mohamed Ali

entry.title: Re: Unable to get SCROM progress
entry.content:
Hi
Thank you very much @ShaneLipke  for the reply.

To your question, indeed right now I want to track course completion.

But I didn't quite understand your question.

My goal is users who started the course and didn't finish, I will know on which page they stopped.
For example: a user who enters a course in which there are 10 pages of a book, and he exits the course from page 7, will record that he completed 70% of the course.

If the structure is not correct, how am I supposed to build it differently?
I also tried to make instead of one book with 10 book pages inside, 10 books with one book page in each book. And it didn't work either.

I am attaching an example of a course I created in Genially and I defined that a grade will not be determined based on the answers to the questions in the course that will show a percentage of progress in the course:

entry.title: Re: iOS Build Failing
entry.content:
When I had the same problem I did the following:

1. generate new server key .cer (I accidentally made an iOS distribution cert instead of the previous 'all platform' cert)

2. generate .p12 file

3. generate new appID

4. generate new provisioning profile

and it works now

entry.title: System does not allow posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs
entry.content:

I need your help for the following issue :

1) Product is batch managed

2) The system is not allowing for posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs in the Batch, but the requirement is ...it should post from EWM to IM-MM

3) With this regard, what are the pre-requisites I need to follow...Kindly help me out...

entry.title: Problem in the condition record detrmination in the billing document.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a problem in the condition record detrmination in the billing document.

I have a pricing precdure linked with a sales order type and billing type  and the order item is relevance for delicvery related billing.

The scenario is the pricing type update the pricing in the billing documnet while creating but when we create collective billing for the same customer there is a condition type detrmine a condition record by the right way in the analysis but in the amount it detrmines the condition record by the wrong way.

Note: The pricing type in the copy control between the delivery and the billing document is "C".

entry.title: Using Typescript in the CAP Project
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I am creating a service in the Cloud application programming . I implemented the Event handlers in typescript and run the service using cds-ts watch. the service was working fine. I added an UI5 application in the App folder of type freestyle. While adding the project, i used the advanced option, choosing type script. I also selected the option to allow cds-ui5-plugin to make changes to the package.json. After i created the UI5 application, when i start the CAP server using cds-ts i am getting the error SELECT is not found in cds types. 

Following are the changes i see in the package.json 

 

How can i correctly setup the typescript project for the Ui5 and CAP development? after removing the changes in package.json and remove the node_modules folder and reinstall the app is working fine. What is the correct procedure to set up the typescript development.

entry.title: JSON to AVRO in ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hi Dear SAP friends,

I have a requirement to convert JSON to AVRO in ABAP.

can someone please let me know if you have any idea, Thank you.

entry.title: Re: solman_setup - Database hosts when connecting a manag...
entry.content: Hello Vera, many thanks for your reply! I have to say a lot about our setup, obviously you don't have all necessary input. We have 2 Solution Managers - DEV and PRD. I am connecting all systems to both Solution Managers. Every system is sending SLD data to the DEV SLD and this is then forwarding the data to the productive SLD. I have checked other systems which I recently connected. They ALL have all Hana servers listed under "Assign Diagnostics Agent" in both Solution Managers and they are ABAP systems. Just the last Java system which I have connected is listing the Hana DB servers correctly in the productive Solution Manager and is not listing them in the DEV Solution Manager. This shouldn't be possible, as the DEV SLD is the one getting the SLD data first and they are obviously correct, if it's giving them further to the productive SLD where things are fine! Regarding KBA 3232202 which you recommended: I have checked the SLD definitions for the Hanas of the Java system and of the other previously mentioned ABAP systems. They are absolutely the same having 4 associations: 3 for each of the Hana servers involved in the HSR setup and one for the virtual Hostname that the SAP system is using to contact the DB. I hope I have explained it clear enough, otherwise please feel free to ask as many questions as you need 😉 Many thanks!

entry.title: Certificate request
entry.content:

I believe that the SAP certified associate-process management consultant certificate would be a great opportunity for me to kickstart my career path in this field of work.

@David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: JSON to AVRO in ABAP Program
entry.content: Looking at the Wikipeda Article for Avro at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Apache_Avro it looks like a binary protocol. Can you describe your usecase in more detail?

entry.title: Re: New primary key definition is invalid due to duplicat...
entry.content: Hi Jabs, Try to specify the pairing column as CITY.

entry.title: Re: Making SAP Business One Web Client accessible externally using nginx as a reverse proxy
entry.content:
Hi @BGLspl 

We strongly recommend using URLs with Domain name instead of using a Public IP.
This also makes sense when it comes to issuing of certificates by certificate authorities As CAs may not support issuing IP address certificates. 
Our internal testing and official documentation (incl. Nginx templates) relies on usage of Domain names and not IP addresses.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ADMIN_GUIDE_HANA/1a2fc202f7f64336abf9fbc957d9b9ba/6091ef3f19494629916744024ffe428c.html

Hope this proves more clarity. In case you still face an issue despite usage of Domain names, I strongly recommend reporting an incident to Support along with the SLD/Keyclock Log files.

Widows

SLD

%programdata%\sap\SAP Business One\Log\SAP Business One ServerTools\System Landscape Directory\
KeycloakC:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One SetupFiles\keycloak\standalone\log\


Linux

SLD

var/log/SAPBusinessOne/ServerTools/SLD

Keycloak /usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/keycloak/standalone/log/


Best Rgs
Guy

entry.title: Re: How to merge multiple PDF forms into single one and write in application server
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for the detailed blog.

I am encountering the following issue: I always receive an empty table when calling the function

 "FP_GET_PDF_TABLE:
CALL FUNCTION 'FP_GET_PDF_TABLE' 
  IMPORTING 
     e_pdf_table = lt_formoutput.

What could be causing this issue? The file is generated correctly, and I have also closed the job properly.

I would appreciate your assistance.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: error got in asset accounting while posting miscellaneous transactios
entry.content:
Contact your system administrator (table error)
Message No. AA813

Diagnosis
The investment support key 11 for the chart of depreciation KSL has not been defined.


Procedure
Define an investment support key using the Customizing menu.

please help me how to solve this error

entry.title: Re: 3E WWI Template / Chapter 14
entry.content: In a nutshell: you are saying that SAP + 3E together use as "Best Practise" not to use the "Usage" on identifier level, BUT we are using this option heavily since the "usage" on identifier level was invented. So the move to 3E solution is not easy for us. Thanks for feedback.

entry.title: Re: Cash Flow Analyzer - treasury link to Cash Management
entry.content: Makes sense

entry.title: Help needed in HR forms WT1000 (Working hours) cumulating please!
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am stuck in an implementation where I am working on how the payslip shows wage type 1000 data. In Forms it gets cumulated into single line. Business expects it to come as individual lines i.e., for each date. In RT table it comes as single lines, but in form it is coming as single line. I already changed V_512W_D PC30 value to 0.

Tcode: PC00_M08_CALC_SIMU 

Below are entries of RT table:

There are two entries for current period in RT table as below (Wagetype 1000):

 total (8 + 5 = 13)

Same for previous period(retro) it also has two entry:

total (8 + 3 = 11)

But when form is displayed it gets added as single line, see below:

 

PS: I dont have much idea about hrforms. Kindly help as this is urgent.

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Question on HRFORMS Metanet
Re: SAP BTP: How to call protected app across regions with SAML and OAuth [2]: Tutorial
entry.content:
Hi Carlos,

As usual, great blog !!! I am a big fan your blogs.

One question though, 

Your comment that "Key Store Location We ignore this field, Key Store Password,We ignore this field as well (nice)" mayn't be true anymore as I see "Key Store Location" a mandatory field now, should a new key pair be created, instead of using the subaccount level key pair ? Should the front end subaccount IDP metadata be updated with this newly created X.509 before importing it in backend subaccount to establish the trust ?

Regards,

Senthil

entry.title: Sync Employee Central Termination Date to S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We are currently replicating data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via an integration in SAP Integration Suite called "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Employee Data".

Is there a way we can replicate the termination date or Company Exit date from Employee Central to S/4 HANA Cloud and apply it to the Business User's validity?

That way whenever an employee is terminated from SuccessFactors, once the sync runs it will update the business user's validity on S/4 Hana Cloud and it will get deactivated.

entry.title: Show PDF Adobe form in Object Page o from Action routine
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In ABAP Restful, I created an action in the CDS, is it possible for the action to show a PDF - Adobe form file?

or

How to display a PDF - Adobe form in xstring format in an Object Page

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Certification Scheduling difficulty. Help please!
entry.content: Hi guys! I'm having difficulty scheduling my SAP exam. I want to do the Sales 2022 certification, specifically C_TS462_2022. I thought that I could buy 1 attempt(CER001) OR 6 attempts(CER006), but I don't even have the option to buy them. Instead, when I try to schedule my exam, the only option it gives me is to buy SAP Learning Hub which has 4 attempts included, circa 1400$. Is this the only way now? Can't I just buy attempts without buying the Learning Hub? Any help would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Data description import from different file
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm doing a budget plan in Sap Analytics Cloud. Right now i have a excel file with all my core data, which is sorted with a lot of economic codes (example: 1.1  , 1.0.1 etc), each code has a description (example: 1.0.1 - technology spendings), the descriptions are in a separate excel file, which connects every code with its description.

Is there any way to import the descriptions excel file to my existing model and match the core file codes with the second files description? In a way that i could have a "Description" dimension.
